raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tà ka Leelee un Masee fchai
Gr: Seimmē nomirs/ un ne taps ap-
rakti/ tee arri ne taps noschehto-
ti/ un ne weenam buhs jewkah-
du Sihnt eegreest/ nedg kahdu
Plekti darriht winnu deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem arri ne buhs nenee-
ka iſdalliht pahr to Noschehtu-
mn/ ka kas taptu eepreezinahts
pahr kahdu Mirronu/ un ne kas
taps no ta Eepreezinaschanas
Biktera dsirdinahts pahr fawu
Tehwu jeb Mahti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne etj arridsan ne kahda
Dsihu-Naimma pee teem feh-
deht/ ehst jeb dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta takka tas KUNGS/
tas Israëta Deews: Reds/ es
likschu no fchahs Weetas vreekſch
juhfahm Azziin/ un juhfäs Dee-
näs mittetees to Balfi ta Pree-
ka/un to Balfi tahs Lihafini-
bas / to Balfi ta Bruhdgana/
un to Balfi tahs Bruhtes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tu ſcheim Landim
wiſſus schohs Wahrdus stahsti-
ti/ un tee uhs tewi fakka: Ka-
pehz runna tas KUNGS prett
mums wiſſu ſcho leelu Kannu-
mu? un kas irr muhfu Nosee-
gums/ un kas irr muhfu Grehki/
ar ko mehs prett to KUNGS u
muhfu Deewu effam apgreh-
koſchees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew uhs teem
fazziht: Tadeht ka juhfu Teh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wi manni irr afstahjufschi/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Un zitteem Dee-
weem paklatdsinnufschees/ un
teem kalpojschi/ un tohs peeluh-
gufschi/ bet manni afstahjufschi/
un mannu Banslibu ne turrej-
schi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs efat niknaki dar-
rijschi neka juhtu Tehwi. Jo
raugt/ juhs staigajat ikweens
pehz fawas niknas Sirde Prah-
ta/ un ne klausat manni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ismettischu es
juhs no fchihs Semmes/ us wee-
nu Semmi/ ko nedg juhs pa-
fihstat nedg juhtu Tehwi/ un tur
juhs kalpofeet zitteem Deeweem
Deenas un Naktis/ tadeht ka es
juhs ne kahdu Schehlastibu
dohschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht raugt/ tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Ka wairs ne taps fazzihts: Tik
teetscham/ ka tas KUNGS dsih-
wo/ kas tohs Israëta Behrnuus
no Egiptes-Semmes irr iswed-
dis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tik teetscham ka tas
KUNGS dsihwo/ kas tohs Is-
raëta Behrnuus irr no Seeneta
Semmes uswedis/ un no wiſ-
fahm Sennnehm/ furp winsch
tohs bij dsinnis/ jo es atweddi-
fchu tohs atkat winnu Semmē/
ko es winnu Tehweem efmu
dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Reds/ es fuhtischu pee
dauds Sweineekem/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Teem buhs tohs
fwetjoht/ un pehz to fuhtischu es
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
